Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Horizon Epoxy Flooring to get the job done right.

“After two winters, my old epoxy floor in Linden Hills was peeling from salt damage. Horizon installed their ArcticShield system right before the polar vortex hit - it's now survived -25°F mornings without a single crack. The blue metallic flakes make shoveling snow almost enjoyable!”

James R. Garage Floor Epoxy
Feb 15, 2025

“Our 1920s St. Paul basement used to flood every spring. Horizon's team not only coated the floor but installed a hidden perimeter drainage system. Now our historic home has a functional rec room that stays dry even during April thaws. Worth every penny.”

Marta S. Basement Floor Coating
Jan 22, 2025

“I run a yoga studio in Uptown and needed something durable yet beautiful. Horizon created a custom blend of lavender and silver flakes that cushions falls while being easy to sanitize. Clients constantly compliment how it sparkles under our pendant lights.”

Devon W. Decorative Flake Flooring
Nov 30, 2024

“Our Eden Prairie driveway had a 3" sinkhole from frost heave. Horizon's foam injection lifted it perfectly level in 90 minutes - no heavy equipment tearing up our landscaping. Two winters later, it hasn't budged despite the extreme temperature swings.”

Lars N. Concrete Repair
Oct 18, 2024

“As operations manager for a Plymouth industrial bakery, I worried about grease and constant washdowns destroying our floors. Horizon's chemical-resistant epoxy with slip-resistant texture has cut our mopping time in half while eliminating employee slips for 18 months running.”

Tami K. Commercial Epoxy
Sep 5, 2024

“The crew transformed our Maple Grove garage just before car season. They accommodated our collection of vintage Corvettes by working around lifts and cabinets. The black epoxy with red flakes makes oil drips easy to spot and clean - crucial for car shows.”

Carlos M. Garage Floor Epoxy
Aug 11, 2024
Horizon Epoxy Flooring

Trusted epoxy flooring professionals serving Minneapolis, MN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
